---
title: "Chess Trainer"
description: "Play chess against nineteen characters from absolute beginner (200) to full engine strength (2600+), each with their own personality, strengths, and weaknesses, plus a built-in coach: timed hints, mistake and blunder warnings before you commit a move, and a post-game grandmaster report. Runs entirely in your browser."
toc: false
show-reading-time: false
page-layout: full
margin-header: ../_templates/empty.html
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }

.chess-wrap { max-width: 1220px; margin: 0 auto; }
.chess-wrap, .chess-wrap * { box-sizing: border-box; }
/* reclaim the (empty) margin column so the board gets real estate */
@media (min-width: 992px) {
  #quarto-margin-sidebar { display: none; }
  #quarto-content main.content { grid-column: page-start-inset / page-end-inset !important; }
}

/* ---------- setup screen ---------- */
.cs-card {
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; margin-top: 12px;
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
}
.cs-label {
  display:block; font-weight:600; margin: 14px 0 8px; font-size: 13px;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px; color: #777;
}
.bot-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px,1fr)); gap:10px; }
.bot-tile {
  display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:center; padding:10px 12px; border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius:10px; cursor:pointer; transition: border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s; background:transparent;
  text-align:left; font: inherit; color: inherit;
}
.bot-tile:hover { border-color:#b9cdf3; }
.bot-tile.sel { border-color:#2c7be5; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(44,123,229,.18); }
.bot-ava {
  width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  color:#fff; font-weight:700; font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; font-size:17px; overflow:hidden;
}
.bot-ava svg { width:100%; height:100%; display:block; }
.bot-tile .bt-name { font-weight:700; font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; font-size:15px; }
.bot-tile .bt-elo { font-size:12.5px; color:#888; }
.bot-profile { border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius:10px; padding:12px 14px; margin-top:12px; }
.bp-head { display:flex; gap:11px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px; }
.bp-head .bot-ava { width:52px; height:52px; }
.bp-name { font-weight:700; font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; font-size:16px; }
.bp-elo { color:#888; font-weight:400; font-size:13px; }
.bp-blurb { font-size:13px; color:#666; font-style:italic; }
.bp-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:5px 16px; font-size:12.5px; color:#555; line-height:1.45; }
@media (max-width: 620px) { .bp-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
.cs-row { display:flex; gap:18px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; }
.seg { display:inline-flex; border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius:9px; overflow:hidden; }
.seg button {
  border:none; background:transparent; padding:8px 14px; cursor:pointer; font:inherit; font-size:14px; color:inherit;
}
.seg button + button { border-left:1.5px solid #e0e0e0; }
.seg button.sel { background:#2c7be5; color:#fff; }
.theme-sel {
  padding:8px 10px; border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius:9px; font:inherit; font-size:14px;
  background:transparent; color:inherit; cursor:pointer;
}
.cs-start {
  margin-top:18px; padding:11px 26px; font-size:16px; font-weight:700; font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;
  background:#2c7be5; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:9px; cursor:pointer;
}
.cs-start:disabled { background:#a8c4ec; cursor:wait; }
.engine-note { font-size:12.5px; color:#999; margin-top:8px; }

/* ---------- game layout ---------- */
.game-area { display:none; margin-top:12px; }
.game-cols { display:flex; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:flex-start; }
/* board grows with the screen: capped by width AND viewport height so it stays fully visible */
.board-col { display:flex; gap:8px; flex: 99 1 440px; min-width: 280px; max-width: min(820px, calc(100vh - 200px)); }
.side-col { flex: 1 1 250px; min-width: 235px; max-width: 360px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; }

/* eval bar */
.evalbar { width:13px; border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; background:#3d3d3d; position:relative; align-self:flex-start; }
.evalbar .white-fill { position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; background:#f5f2ec; transition: height .6s ease; }
.evalbar .zero { position:absolute; top:50%; left:0; right:0; height:1px; background:rgba(128,128,128,.6); }

/* board */
.chess-wrap { --sq-light:#f0d9b5; --sq-dark:#b58863; }
.board-outer { flex:1; position:relative; }
.tilt-wrap { position:relative; }
.board {
  width:100%; aspect-ratio:1; display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(8,1fr); grid-template-rows:repeat(8,1fr);
  border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; touch-action:none; user-select:none; -webkit-user-select:none;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.18); position:relative;
}
.sq { position:relative; }
.sq.light { background:var(--sq-light); }
.sq.dark  { background:var(--sq-dark); }
.sq .coord { position:absolute; font-size:min(1.7vw,11px); font-weight:700; opacity:.75; pointer-events:none; font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; }
.sq .coord.file { right:3px; bottom:1px; }
.sq .coord.rank { left:3px; top:2px; }
.sq.light .coord { color:var(--sq-dark); }
.sq.dark  .coord { color:var(--sq-light); }
.sq img.pc { position:absolute; inset:2.5%; width:95%; height:95%; pointer-events:none; }
.sq.lastmove::before, .sq.selsq::before, .sq.hint-from::before, .sq.hint-to::before,
.sq.tint-mist::before, .sq.tint-blun::before, .sq.checksq::before {
  content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none;
}
.sq.lastmove::before { background:rgba(155,199,0,.41); }
.sq.selsq::before    { background:rgba(20,85,30,.45); }
.sq.hint-from::before, .sq.hint-to::before { background:rgba(44,123,229,.42); animation: hintpulse 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
@keyframes hintpulse { 0%,100% { opacity:.45; } 50% { opacity:.95; } }
.sq.tint-mist::before { background:rgba(230,126,34,.55); }
.sq.tint-blun::before { background:rgba(231,76,60,.55); }
.sq.checksq::before { background:radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(231,76,60,.75) 15%, rgba(231,76,60,.25) 55%, transparent 70%); }
.sq .dot { position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; pointer-events:none; }
.sq .dot::after { content:''; width:26%; height:26%; border-radius:50%; background:rgba(20,60,20,.25); }
.sq .dot.cap::after { width:88%; height:88%; background:transparent; border:4px solid rgba(20,60,20,.25); }
img.drag-ghost { position:fixed; pointer-events:none; z-index:1000; opacity:.9; }
.arrow-layer { position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; z-index:5; }

/* confirm bar */
.confirm-bar {
  display:none; margin-top:8px; padding:10px 12px; border-radius:9px; font-size:14.5px;
  border:2px solid; align-items:center; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.confirm-bar.mist { display:flex; border-color:#e67e22; background:rgba(230,126,34,.09); }
.confirm-bar.blun { display:flex; border-color:#e74c3c; background:rgba(231,76,60,.09); }
.confirm-bar .cb-text { flex:1; min-width:140px; }
.confirm-bar button {
  border:none; border-radius:7px; padding:7px 13px; cursor:pointer; font:inherit; font-size:13.5px; font-weight:700;
}
.cb-back { background:#2c7be5; color:#fff; }
.cb-play { background:#e0e0e0; color:#333; }
.confirm-bar.draw-bar.show { display:flex; border-color:#2c7be5; background:rgba(44,123,229,.08); }
.grading-note { display:none; margin-top:8px; font-size:13px; color:#888; }

/* side panel */
.panel-box { border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius:10px; padding:11px 13px; background:var(--bs-body-bg,#fff); }
.opp-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
.opp-row .o-name { font-weight:700; font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; }
.opp-row .o-elo { font-size:12.5px; color:#888; }
.think-dots { margin-left:auto; display:none; gap:3px; align-items:flex-end; padding-right:2px; }
.think-dots.on { display:inline-flex; }
.think-dots i { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:#2c7be5; animation:tdots 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; }
.think-dots i:nth-child(2) { animation-delay:.18s; }
.think-dots i:nth-child(3) { animation-delay:.36s; }
@keyframes tdots { 0%,60%,100% { transform:translateY(0); opacity:.35; } 30% { transform:translateY(-4px); opacity:1; } }
.clock {
  font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:24px; text-align:center; border-radius:8px;
  padding:5px 0; background:#f1f3f5; color:#333; letter-spacing:1px;
}
.clock.active { background:#2c7be5; color:#fff; }
.clock.low { background:#e74c3c; color:#fff; }
.clock-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
.clock-row .who { flex:1; font-size:13.5px; color:#777; }
.clock-row .clock { width:112px; }
.coach-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.switch { position:relative; width:38px; height:22px; flex-shrink:0; }
.switch input { opacity:0; width:0; height:0; }
.switch .sl { position:absolute; inset:0; background:#ccc; border-radius:22px; transition:.2s; cursor:pointer; }
.switch .sl::before { content:''; position:absolute; width:16px; height:16px; left:3px; top:3px; background:#fff; border-radius:50%; transition:.2s; }
.switch input:checked + .sl { background:#2c7be5; }
.switch input:checked + .sl::before { transform:translateX(16px); }
.hint-btn {
  border:1.5px solid #2c7be5; color:#2c7be5; background:transparent; border-radius:7px;
  padding:5px 11px; cursor:pointer; font:inherit; font-size:13px; font-weight:700;
}
.hint-btn:disabled { opacity:.4; cursor:default; }
.evaltxt { margin-left:auto; font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:14px; color:#555; }
.coach-msg { font-size:13.5px; min-height:38px; color:#555; line-height:1.45; }
.coach-msg b.mv { font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; }
.perf-line { font-size:12.5px; color:#888; margin-top:7px; border-top:1px dashed #e0e0e0; padding-top:7px; }
.late-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-size:12.5px; color:#777; margin-top:7px; cursor:pointer; }
.late-row input { accent-color:#2c7be5; margin:0; }
.moves-box { max-height:190px; overflow-y:auto; font-size:13.5px; }
.moves-box table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }
.moves-box td { padding:2.5px 4px; }
.moves-box td.num { color:#999; width:30px; }
.moves-box td.mv { width:38%; font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif; font-weight:600; }
.badge-c { display:inline-block; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; border-radius:5px; padding:0 5px; margin-left:5px; color:#fff; vertical-align:1px; }
.badge-c.best { background:#27ae60; } .badge-c.excellent { background:#27ae60; }
.badge-c.good { background:#95a5a6; }
.badge-c.inaccuracy { background:#f1c40f; color:#5c4d00; }
.badge-c.mistake { background:#e67e22; }
.badge-c.blunder { background:#e74c3c; }
.act-row { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.act-row button {
  flex:1; border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0; background:transparent; border-radius:8px; padding:8px 6px;
  cursor:pointer; font:inherit; font-size:13.5px; color:inherit;
}
.act-row button:hover { border-color:#b9cdf3; }
.act-row button.danger:hover { border-color:#e74c3c; color:#e74c3c; }

/* promotion picker + end modal */
.overlay {
  display:none; position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,.45); z-index:20;
  align-items:center; justify-content:center; border-radius:6px;
}
.overlay.show { display:flex; }
.promo-box { background:#fff; border-radius:12px; padding:12px; display:flex; gap:8px; }
.promo-box img { width:56px; height:56px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:9px; padding:4px; }
.promo-box img:hover { background:#e8f0fd; }
.end-box { background:var(--bs-body-bg,#fff); border-radius:14px; padding:22px 26px; max-width:88%; width:400px; max-height:88%; overflow-y:auto; box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.25); }
.end-box h3 { margin:0 0 4px; font-size:20px; }
.end-box .sub { color:#888; font-size:14px; margin-bottom:12px; }
.rep-counts { display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:12px; }
.rep-counts span { font-size:12.5px; border-radius:6px; padding:3px 8px; background:#f1f3f5; color:#444; }
.rep-mist { font-size:13.5px; margin:4px 0; color:#555; }
.gm-box { border-top:1.5px solid #e0e0e0; margin-top:14px; padding-top:10px; }
.gm-box p { font-size:13px; color:#555; margin:6px 0; line-height:1.55; }
.gm-head { display:flex; gap:9px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:4px; }
.gm-head .bot-ava { width:34px; height:34px; }
.gm-sub { font-size:12px; color:#999; }
.end-box .act-row { margin-top:14px; }
.credits { font-size:12px; color:#aaa; margin-top:22px; }
.credits a { color:#aaa; }

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  .clock { font-size:20px; }
  .moves-box { max-height:140px; }
}
</style>

<div class="chess-wrap">

  <!-- ============ SETUP ============ -->
  <div class="cs-card" id="setupCard">
    <span class="cs-label">Choose your opponent</span>
    <div class="bot-grid" id="botGrid"></div>
    <div class="bot-profile" id="botProfile"></div>

    <div class="cs-row" style="margin-top:6px;">
      <div>
        <span class="cs-label">Your color</span>
        <div class="seg" id="colorSeg">
          <button data-v="w" class="sel">White</button><button data-v="random">Random</button><button data-v="b">Black</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="cs-label">Time control</span>
        <div class="seg" id="tcSeg">
          <button data-v="5+3">5+3</button><button data-v="10+5">10+5</button><button data-v="15+10" class="sel">15+10</button><button data-v="30+0">30+0</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="cs-label">Coach</span>
        <div class="seg" id="coachSeg">
          <button data-v="on" class="sel">On</button><button data-v="off">Off</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="cs-label">Bot pace</span>
        <div class="seg" id="paceSeg">
          <button data-v="real" class="sel">Realistic</button><button data-v="quick">Quick</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="cs-label">Board</span>
        <select id="themeSel" class="theme-sel"></select>
      </div>
    </div>

    <button class="cs-start" id="startBtn" disabled>Loading engine…</button>
    <div class="engine-note" id="engineNote">Downloading Stockfish (~7&nbsp;MB). It runs entirely in your browser; nothing is sent to a server.</div>
  </div>

  <!-- ============ GAME ============ -->
  <div class="game-area" id="gameArea">
    <div class="game-cols">

      <div class="board-col">
        <div class="evalbar" id="evalbar" title="Engine evaluation"><div class="white-fill" id="evalFill" style="height:50%"></div><div class="zero"></div></div>
        <div class="board-outer" id="boardOuter">
          <div class="tilt-wrap">
            <div class="board" id="board"></div>
            <svg class="arrow-layer" id="arrowLayer" viewBox="0 0 8 8"></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="overlay" id="promoOverlay"><div class="promo-box" id="promoBox"></div></div>
          <div class="overlay" id="endOverlay"><div class="end-box" id="endBox"></div></div>
          <div class="confirm-bar" id="confirmBar">
            <span class="cb-text" id="confirmText"></span>
            <button class="cb-back" id="cbBack">Take back</button>
            <button class="cb-play" id="cbPlay">Play it anyway</button>
          </div>
          <div class="confirm-bar draw-bar" id="drawBar">
            <span class="cb-text" id="drawText"></span>
            <button class="cb-back" id="dbAccept">Accept ½–½</button>
            <button class="cb-play" id="dbDecline">Decline</button>
          </div>
          <div class="grading-note" id="gradingNote">Coach is checking your move…</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="side-col">
        <div class="panel-box">
          <div class="opp-row">
            <div class="bot-ava" id="gAva">A</div>
            <div><div class="o-name" id="gBotName"></div><div class="o-elo" id="gBotElo"></div></div>
            <span class="think-dots" id="thinkDots" title="thinking…"><i></i><i></i><i></i></span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="panel-box">
          <div class="clock-row"><span class="who" id="topWho"></span><div class="clock" id="topClock">15:00</div></div>
          <div class="clock-row" style="margin-top:8px;"><span class="who" id="botWho"></span><div class="clock" id="bottomClock">15:00</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="panel-box">
          <div class="coach-row">
            <label class="switch" title="Coach on/off"><input type="checkbox" id="coachToggle" checked><span class="sl"></span></label>
            <span style="font-size:13.5px;">Coach</span>
            <button class="hint-btn" id="hintBtn">Hint</button>
            <span class="evaltxt" id="evalTxt">0.0</span>
          </div>
          <label class="late-row"><input type="checkbox" id="lateHint"> Late hints: wait 20&nbsp;s / 40&nbsp;s before helping</label>
          <div class="coach-msg" id="coachMsg" style="margin-top:8px;">Make your move. If you think for a while, I'll point you in the right direction.</div>
          <div class="perf-line" id="perfLine" style="display:none;"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="panel-box moves-box" id="movesBox"><table><tbody id="movesBody"></tbody></table></div>
        <div class="act-row">
          <button id="resignBtn" class="danger">Resign</button>
          <button id="pgnBtn">Copy PGN</button>
          <button id="newBtn">New game</button>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="credits">
    Powered by <a href="https://github.com/official-stockfish/Stockfish" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Stockfish</a> (GPLv3, via
    <a href="https://github.com/nmrugg/stockfish.js" target="_blank" rel="noopener">stockfish.js</a>) and
    <a href="https://github.com/jhlywa/chess.js" target="_blank" rel="noopener">chess.js</a>.
    Piece images by Colin M.L. Burnett (CC&nbsp;BY-SA&nbsp;3.0). Everything runs locally in your browser.
  </div>
</div>

<script type="module">
import { Chess } from './chess-assets/chess.js';

/* ============================== config ============================== */
/* think: human-like time profile (seconds) — normal range, chance of a long tank, tank cap.
   randomP: fraction of moves replaced by a random legal move (below Stockfish's floor).
   profile: shown on the selection card — strengths, weaknesses, experience, fun fact. */
const BOTS = [
  { id:'zack',    name:'Zack',    elo:200,  mode:'skill', skill:0, depth:1, randomP:.5,  color:'#a3b18a', blurb:'Chaotic optimist. Learned the rules yesterday and is thrilled about it.', think:{ min:1.5, max:5,   pLong:.05, longMax:10 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Absolutely fearless; occasionally stumbles into a brilliancy.', weaknesses:'Hangs everything. Sometimes forgets he has a queen.', years:'Age 31. He started two weeks ago.', fun:'Names every pawn. The first one he loses is always "Kevin".' } },
  { id:'alice',   name:'Alice',   elo:400,  mode:'skill', skill:0, depth:1, randomP:.3,  color:'#e8927c', blurb:'Sunday-afternoon beginner with big capture energy.',                     think:{ min:2,   max:5.5, pLong:.06, longMax:11 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Loves capturing; knows en passant and will absolutely show it off.', weaknesses:'Back-rank naps. A magnet for scholar’s mate.', years:'Age 7. Three months in and fully committed.', fun:'All pieces must face the same way or she cannot think.' } },
  { id:'bob',     name:'Bob',     elo:550,  mode:'skill', skill:0, depth:2, randomP:.18, color:'#e2b04a', blurb:'Weekend warrior. Builds a pawn wall and hides behind it.',               think:{ min:2,   max:6,   pLong:.07, longMax:13 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Sturdy pawn chains; hard to checkmate quickly.', weaknesses:'Knight forks. Even his cutlery drawer makes him nervous.', years:'Age 19, in college. About one real year of chess since.', fun:'Blames every loss on a "mouse slip", even over the board.' } },
  { id:'charlie', name:'Charlie', elo:700,  mode:'skill', skill:1, depth:2, randomP:.1,  color:'#9ac356', blurb:'Park-bench hustler in training. All tricks, no theory.',                 think:{ min:2.2, max:7,   pLong:.08, longMax:15 },
    profile:{ strengths:'One-move threats and cheap tricks that keep working.', weaknesses:'Anything two moves deep.', years:'Age 15. Two years of video clips later, here we are.', fun:'Learned everything from 30-second video clips. It shows.' } },
  { id:'daisy',   name:'Daisy',   elo:850,  mode:'skill', skill:1, depth:3, randomP:.05, color:'#56b8a2', blurb:'Café player. Attacks first, counts material later.',                think:{ min:2.4, max:7.5, pLong:.09, longMax:16 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Brave gambits; genuinely dangerous with the initiative.', weaknesses:'Endgames put her to sleep. Literally, once.', years:'Age 24. Three years of café battles.', fun:'Brings her own flower-shaped chess clock to every game.' } },
  { id:'ethan',   name:'Ethan',   elo:1000, mode:'skill', skill:2, depth:3,              color:'#5aa7d6', blurb:'Club newcomer who just discovered openings have names.',                 think:{ min:2.5, max:8,   pLong:.10, longMax:18 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Knows the first six moves of five openings by heart.', weaknesses:'Chronic time-trouble addict who burns ten minutes on move nine.', years:'Age 30. Four years in the club.', fun:'Says "interesting…" out loud right before every blunder.' } },
  { id:'fiona',   name:'Fiona',   elo:1150, mode:'skill', skill:3, depth:4,              color:'#7b86dd', blurb:'Tactics gremlin. Sharp, quick, and slightly reckless.',                  think:{ min:2.8, max:9,   pLong:.11, longMax:20 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Spots knight forks from a mile away.', weaknesses:'Strategy? Never heard of her. Quiet positions are her kryptonite.', years:'Age 12. Five years and a thousand puzzles later.', fun:'Does puzzle rush at red lights. As a passenger. Usually.' } },
  { id:'grace',   name:'Grace',   elo:1300, mode:'skill', skill:5, depth:5,              color:'#b06fd0', blurb:'Solid club regular. Calm, careful, never falls for the same trick twice.',           think:{ min:3,   max:10,  pLong:.12, longMax:24 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Rock-solid defense. Punishes overextension.', weaknesses:'So cautious that she offers draws in winning positions. Yes, she will do it to you.', years:'Age 35. Eight careful years.', fun:'Her cat is named Zugzwang. The goldfish is Luft.' }, quirks:{ drawOffer:{ p:.5, advantage:200, max:2, gapPlies:12 } } },
  { id:'henry',   name:'Henry',   elo:1450, mode:'elo',   uciElo:1450,                   color:'#c78a53', blurb:'Club veteran. Slow, steady, and grumpy about modern chess.',             think:{ min:3.5, max:11,  pLong:.12, longMax:30 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Endgame grinder; wins rook endings a pawn down on stubbornness.', weaknesses:'Modern opening fashion. "In my day we played 1.e4 and meant it."', years:'Age 41. Twenty years, all in the same club chair.', fun:'Keeps score in a paper scorebook. Refuses pencils that have erasers.' } },
  { id:'iris',    name:'Iris',    elo:1600, mode:'elo',   uciElo:1600,                   color:'#d67ab1', blurb:'Tournament regular with serious opening preparation.',                   think:{ min:3.5, max:12,  pLong:.12, longMax:35 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Opening prep deeper than most rivers.', weaknesses:'Tilts hard after one bad game. Do not ask about round 4 in Reno.', years:'Age 22. Six years, four of them spent on openings.', fun:'Wears lucky earrings. Lost one mid-tournament and still won: "turns out one is enough."' } },
  { id:'jack',    name:'Jack',    elo:1750, mode:'elo',   uciElo:1750,                   color:'#647acb', blurb:'City-league legend, grandfather of five, attacks like a caffeinated teenager.',            think:{ min:4,   max:12.5,pLong:.13, longMax:38 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Relentless attacker. Smells a weak king through the board.', weaknesses:'Patience. Quiet maneuvering bores him, and long endgames make him sleepy.', years:'Age 8. Seventy years later he is still attacking. He is 78.', fun:'Won the 1974 club championship in this tie. Has worn it to every game since. Never washed it.' } },
  { id:'kira',    name:'Kira',    elo:1900, mode:'elo',   uciElo:1900,                   color:'#a4586e', blurb:'Grandmother of six. Streams blitz. Chat calls her The Nightmare.',                think:{ min:4,   max:13,  pLong:.13, longMax:42 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Calculation as sharp as ever. Counts to move twelve without blinking.', weaknesses:'Overthinks simple recaptures. Once spent 12 minutes on one, live on stream.', years:'Age 9. Seventy-two years of calculation and counting. She is 81.', fun:'Bakes cookies for her opponents before the game, then flags them in the endgame.' } },
  { id:'liam',    name:'Liam',    elo:2000, mode:'elo',   uciElo:2000,                   color:'#6aa84f', blurb:'The club expert. Converts microscopic edges with a straight face.',      think:{ min:4,   max:14,  pLong:.14, longMax:45 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Ruthless technique; a +0.5 against Liam feels terminal.', weaknesses:'Superstitious. Quotes "a knight on the rim is grim" even when the knight is winning.', years:'Age 21. Twelve years of quiet squeezing.', fun:'Won his club title playing the same opening seven rounds in a row. Nobody dared ask why.' } },
  { id:'maya',    name:'Maya',    elo:2100, mode:'elo',   uciElo:2100,  title:'WFM',     color:'#b5651d', blurb:'Positional artist. Your plan was refuted before you finished it.',       think:{ min:4.5, max:15,  pLong:.14, longMax:47 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Prophylaxis. She answers questions you were about to ask.', weaknesses:'Finds king attacks vaguely impolite; would rather squeeze.', years:'Age 6. Fourteen years of fountain-pen annotations.', fun:'Annotates her games in fountain pen. Three colors. No mistakes.' } },
  { id:'noah',    name:'Noah',    elo:2200, mode:'elo',   uciElo:2200,  title:'CM',      color:'#4a90a4', blurb:'The theoretician. Knows 25 moves of theory in 40 openings.',             think:{ min:5,   max:16,  pLong:.15, longMax:50 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Encyclopedic openings; plays the first 20 moves at blitz speed.', weaknesses:'A novelty on move 8 short-circuits him completely.', years:'Age 13. Fifteen years, most of them inside books.', fun:'Fell asleep reading Dvoretsky. Twice. Still recommends it "for the serious student."' } },
  { id:'olivia',  name:'Olivia',  elo:2300, mode:'elo',   uciElo:2300,  title:'FM',      color:'#e6b422', blurb:'Attacking prodigy. Her sacrifices shouldn’t work. They do.',        think:{ min:5,   max:16,  pLong:.15, longMax:52 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Intuitive sacrifices the engine only approves of ten moves later.', weaknesses:'Defense is, in her words, "someone else’s problem."', years:'Age 6. First trophy at 8, first named sacrifice at 15.', fun:'Has a sacrifice named after her at her club. Declining "The Olivia" is considered rude.' } },
  { id:'pablo',   name:'Pablo',   elo:2400, mode:'elo',   uciElo:2400,  title:'IM',      color:'#8d6e63', blurb:'Grand old technician. Squeezes water from stone, slowly.',               think:{ min:6,   max:18,  pLong:.16, longMax:58 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Thirty years of polished endgames; converts anything dry.', weaknesses:'Fast time controls. "10+10? That is not chess, that is typing."', years:'Age 10. Thirty-five years of endgames.', fun:'Claims his mustache is insured. Strokes it exactly twice before every winning move.' } },
  { id:'quinn',   name:'Quinn',   elo:2500, mode:'elo',   uciElo:2500,  title:'GM',      color:'#26a69a', blurb:'The young grandmaster. Universal style, no exploitable pattern.',        think:{ min:5,   max:17,  pLong:.15, longMax:58 },
    profile:{ strengths:'Everything, in every position type. Genuinely hard to prepare against.', weaknesses:'Occasional overconfidence against "weaker" players. Relatively speaking.', years:'Age 4. GM at 17. Currently 17.', fun:'Plays guitar between rounds and insists arpeggios and combinations are the same thing.' } },
  { id:'ryan',    name:'Ryan',    elo:2600, mode:'full',  movetime:1200, title:'GM',     color:'#d0556e', blurb:'The final boss. Full engine strength. Good luck.', eloLabel:'2600+',    think:{ min:5,   max:18,  pLong:.15, longMax:60 },
    profile:{ strengths:'All of them.', weaknesses:'None that you will live long enough to reach.', years:'An age he refuses to disclose. "Since before you."', fun:'Wears sunglasses indoors so opponents can’t see him not blinking. The crown is non-negotiable.' } },
];
/* FIDE-style display name: only titled players get a prefix (CM 2200+, IM 2400+, GM 2500+) */
const bName = b => (b.title ? b.title + ' ' : '') + b.name;
const HINT1_MS = 10000, HINT2_MS = 20000;   // 10 s → piece, 20 s → destination
const MATE = 100000;
const THEMES = {
  classic: { light:'#f0d9b5', dark:'#b58863', label:'Classic' },
  green:   { light:'#ffffdd', dark:'#86a666', label:'Tournament Green' },
  blue:    { light:'#dee3e6', dark:'#8ca2ad', label:'Ice Blue' },
  walnut:  { light:'#e3c193', dark:'#a1683f', label:'Walnut' },
  slate:   { light:'#d1d5d9', dark:'#7a8290', label:'Slate' },
};
const FILES = 'abcdefgh';
const PIECE_SRC = p => `chess-assets/pieces/${p.color}${p.type.toUpperCase()}.svg`;

/* ============================== avatars ============================== */
/* code-drawn cartoon faces; each bot gets skin, hair style/color and accessories */
const AVATARS = {
  zack:    { skin:'#f6d0b1', hair:'#6b4226', style:'cap',   cap:'#e74c3c', freckles:true },
  alice:   { skin:'#f6d0b1', hair:'#e8c25a', style:'pigtails', freckles:true },
  bob:     { skin:'#eab68f', hair:'#7b5233', style:'short' },
  charlie: { skin:'#8d5a3b', hair:'#241d18', style:'curly' },
  daisy:   { skin:'#f6d0b1', hair:'#8a5a2b', style:'bun',   flower:true },
  ethan:   { skin:'#d29b6e', hair:'#2c2c2c', style:'side',  glasses:true },
  fiona:   { skin:'#f7d3b3', hair:'#b3502d', style:'long' },
  grace:   { skin:'#eab68f', hair:'#4a4a4a', style:'bob',   glasses:true },
  henry:   { skin:'#a9714b', hair:'#3d2f23', style:'beard' },
  iris:    { skin:'#d29b6e', hair:'#1e1e24', style:'bob',   earrings:true },
  jack:    { skin:'#f6d0b1', hair:'#cfcfcf', style:'slick', collar:true, glasses:true },
  kira:    { skin:'#f6d0b1', hair:'#d8d8d8', style:'bun',   glasses:true, earrings:true },
  liam:    { skin:'#f7d3b3', hair:'#a5713f', style:'curly' },
  maya:    { skin:'#a9714b', hair:'#241d18', style:'bun',   glasses:true },
  noah:    { skin:'#f6d0b1', hair:'#1e1e24', style:'beard', glasses:true },
  olivia:  { skin:'#f7d3b3', hair:'#e8c25a', style:'long' },
  pablo:   { skin:'#d29b6e', hair:'#6e6a67', style:'short', mustache:true },
  quinn:   { skin:'#eab68f', hair:'#2a9d8f', style:'short', earrings:true },
  ryan:    { skin:'#eab68f', hair:'#2c2118', style:'crown', shades:true, smirk:true },
};
function avatarSVG(b) {
  const a = AVATARS[b.id];
  if (!a) return `<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><text x="32" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="26" fill="#fff">${b.name[0]}</text></svg>`;
  const H = a.hair, p = [];
  p.push(`<circle cx="32" cy="36" r="17" fill="${a.skin}"/>`);
  const band = `<path d="M15 36 A17 17 0 0 1 49 36 L49 29 Q32 24 15 29 Z" fill="${H}"/>`;
  switch (a.style) {
    case 'short': p.push(band); break;
    case 'curly':
      p.push(band);
      for (const [cx, cy] of [[17,26],[23,20],[32,17.5],[41,20],[47,26]]) p.push(`<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="4.6" fill="${H}"/>`);
      break;
    case 'pigtails':
      p.push(`<circle cx="12.5" cy="33" r="6.5" fill="${H}"/>`, `<circle cx="51.5" cy="33" r="6.5" fill="${H}"/>`, band);
      break;
    case 'bun':
      p.push(band, `<circle cx="32" cy="13.5" r="6" fill="${H}"/>`);
      if (a.flower) {
        for (const [dx, dy] of [[-2.7,0],[2.7,0],[0,-2.7],[0,2.7]]) p.push(`<circle cx="${41+dx}" cy="${15+dy}" r="1.9" fill="#e8608a"/>`);
        p.push(`<circle cx="41" cy="15" r="1.7" fill="#f5d547"/>`);
      }
      break;
    case 'side':
      p.push(`<path d="M15 36 A17 17 0 0 1 49 36 L49 28 Q44 20.5 33 22.5 Q20 25 15 31 Z" fill="${H}"/>`);
      break;
    case 'long':
      p.push(band,
        `<path d="M13.5 32 Q13 52 17 56 L22 54 Q19.5 45 20.5 33 Z" fill="${H}"/>`,
        `<path d="M50.5 32 Q51 52 47 56 L42 54 Q44.5 45 43.5 33 Z" fill="${H}"/>`);
      break;
    case 'bob':
      p.push(band,
        `<path d="M14 32 Q13.5 46 17.5 49 L22.5 47 Q20 40 20.5 32 Z" fill="${H}"/>`,
        `<path d="M50 32 Q50.5 46 46.5 49 L41.5 47 Q44 40 43.5 32 Z" fill="${H}"/>`);
      break;
    case 'beard':
      p.push(band, `<path d="M16 38 Q16 57 32 57 Q48 57 48 38 L48 34 Q42 44 32 44 Q22 44 16 34 Z" fill="${H}"/>`);
      break;
    case 'slick':
      p.push(`<path d="M15 36 A17 17 0 0 1 49 36 L49 27 Q45 19 34 20 Q21 21.5 15 29 Z" fill="${H}"/>`);
      break;
    case 'cap':
      p.push(`<path d="M14.5 29 A17.5 13.5 0 0 1 49.5 29 L49.5 31.5 L14.5 31.5 Z" fill="${a.cap}"/>`,
             `<rect x="45" y="25" width="13" height="4.6" rx="2.3" fill="${a.cap}"/>`,
             `<circle cx="32" cy="20" r="1.6" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.25)"/>`);
      break;
    case 'crown':
      p.push(band,
        `<path d="M19 15.5 L24 21 L28.5 13.5 L32 21 L35.5 13.5 L40 21 L45 15.5 L45 23.5 L19 23.5 Z" fill="#e9b949" stroke="#c99a2e" stroke-width="1"/>`,
        `<circle cx="24" cy="21" r="1" fill="#d0556e"/>`, `<circle cx="40" cy="21" r="1" fill="#2c7be5"/>`);
      break;
  }
  if (a.shades) {
    p.push(`<rect x="19" y="31.5" width="11.5" height="7.5" rx="2.4" fill="#26262b"/>`,
           `<rect x="33.5" y="31.5" width="11.5" height="7.5" rx="2.4" fill="#26262b"/>`,
           `<line x1="30" y1="34" x2="34" y2="34" stroke="#26262b" stroke-width="2"/>`);
  } else {
    p.push(`<circle cx="25.5" cy="35" r="2.1" fill="#33322e"/>`, `<circle cx="38.5" cy="35" r="2.1" fill="#33322e"/>`);
    if (a.glasses) {
      p.push(`<circle cx="25.5" cy="35.5" r="5.4" fill="none" stroke="#3b3b3b" stroke-width="1.6"/>`,
             `<circle cx="38.5" cy="35.5" r="5.4" fill="none" stroke="#3b3b3b" stroke-width="1.6"/>`,
             `<line x1="30.9" y1="35.5" x2="33.1" y2="35.5" stroke="#3b3b3b" stroke-width="1.6"/>`);
    }
  }
  if (a.style === 'beard') p.push(`<path d="M27 48.5 Q32 51.5 37 48.5" stroke="${a.skin}" stroke-width="2.2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>`);
  else if (a.smirk) p.push(`<path d="M27.5 45.5 Q33.5 48.5 38 43.5" stroke="#7c4f35" stroke-width="1.9" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>`);
  else p.push(`<path d="M26 44.5 Q32 49.5 38 44.5" stroke="#7c4f35" stroke-width="1.9" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>`);
  if (a.mustache) p.push(`<path d="M24.5 42.5 Q28 40 32 42.2 Q36 40 39.5 42.5 Q36 45.2 32 43.4 Q28 45.2 24.5 42.5 Z" fill="${H}"/>`);
  if (a.freckles) for (const [cx, cy] of [[23,40.5],[26.5,42],[37.5,42],[41,40.5]]) p.push(`<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="1" fill="rgba(150,90,50,.5)"/>`);
  if (a.earrings) p.push(`<circle cx="15.5" cy="45" r="2" fill="#e9b949"/>`, `<circle cx="48.5" cy="45" r="2" fill="#e9b949"/>`);
  if (a.collar) p.push(`<path d="M22 56 L32 50 L42 56 L42 64 L22 64 Z" fill="#fff"/>`,
                       `<path d="M30 54 L32 51.5 L34 54 L32 59.5 Z" fill="#8c2f39"/>`);
  return `<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="${b.name}">${p.join('')}</svg>`;
}

/* ============================== engine ============================== */
class Engine {
  constructor(url) {
    this.worker = new Worker(url);
    this.worker.onmessage = e => this._line(String(e.data));
    this.queue = []; this.current = null;
    this.ready = new Promise(res => { this._readyRes = res; });
    this.run({ cmds:['uci'], done:l => l === 'uciok' })
      .then(() => this.run({ cmds:['setoption name Hash value 32','isready'], done:l => l === 'readyok' }))
      .then(() => this._readyRes());
  }
  _line(line) {
    const job = this.current;
    if (!job) return;
    if (job.onLine) job.onLine(line);
    if (job.done(line)) { this.current = null; job.resolve(line); this._pump(); }
  }
  run(job) {
    return new Promise(resolve => {
      this.queue.push({ ...job, resolve });
      this._pump();
    });
  }
  _pump() {
    if (this.current || !this.queue.length) return;
    this.current = this.queue.shift();
    for (const c of this.current.cmds) this.worker.postMessage(c);
  }
  stopIf(kind) {
    if (this.current && this.current.kind === kind) this.worker.postMessage('stop');
  }
  newGame() { return this.run({ cmds:['ucinewgame','isready'], done:l => l === 'readyok' }); }

  static parseInfo(line) {
    if (!line.startsWith('info ') || !line.includes(' pv ')) return null;
    const depth = /\bdepth (\d+)/.exec(line);
    const cp    = /\bscore cp (-?\d+)/.exec(line);
    const mate  = /\bscore mate (-?\d+)/.exec(line);
    const pv    = /\bpv (.+)$/.exec(line);
    if (!depth || !pv || (!cp && !mate)) return null;
    const m = mate ? parseInt(mate[1]) : null;
    const score = m !== null ? (m > 0 ? MATE - m : -MATE - m) : parseInt(cp[1]);
    return { depth:+depth[1], score, mate:m, pv:pv[1].trim().split(/\s+/) };
  }
  fullStrengthCmds() {
    return ['setoption name UCI_LimitStrength value false','setoption name Skill Level value 20'];
  }
  /* One-shot evaluation of a position (side to move perspective). */
  evalPosition(fen, movesUci, movetime) {
    let last = null;
    return this.run({
      kind:'eval',
      cmds:[...this.fullStrengthCmds(),
            `position fen ${fen}${movesUci ? ' moves ' + movesUci : ''}`,
            `go movetime ${movetime}`],
      onLine:l => { const i = Engine.parseInfo(l); if (i) last = i; },
      done:l => l.startsWith('bestmove'),
    }).then(l => {
      const best = l.split(/\s+/)[1];
      return { ...(last || { score:0, mate:null, depth:0, pv:[] }), bestUci:best };
    });
  }
  /* Streaming full-strength analysis; onInfo fires as depth grows. */
  analyse(fen, onInfo) {
    return this.run({
      kind:'analysis',
      cmds:[...this.fullStrengthCmds(), `position fen ${fen}`, 'go depth 22'],
      onLine:l => { const i = Engine.parseInfo(l); if (i) onInfo(i); },
      done:l => l.startsWith('bestmove'),
    });
  }
  botMove(bot, fen) {
    const cmds = [];
    if (bot.mode === 'elo') {
      cmds.push('setoption name Skill Level value 20',
                'setoption name UCI_LimitStrength value true',
                `setoption name UCI_Elo value ${bot.uciElo}`,
                `position fen ${fen}`, 'go movetime 900');
    } else if (bot.mode === 'skill') {
      cmds.push('setoption name UCI_LimitStrength value false',
                `setoption name Skill Level value ${bot.skill}`,
                `position fen ${fen}`, `go depth ${bot.depth}`);
    } else {
      cmds.push(...this.fullStrengthCmds(), `position fen ${fen}`, `go movetime ${bot.movetime}`);
    }
    return this.run({ kind:'bot', cmds, done:l => l.startsWith('bestmove') })
      .then(l => l.split(/\s+/)[1]);
  }
}

/* ============================== dom refs ============================== */
const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
const boardEl = $('board'), arrowLayer = $('arrowLayer');
const setupCard = $('setupCard'), gameArea = $('gameArea');
const confirmBar = $('confirmBar'), confirmText = $('confirmText'), gradingNote = $('gradingNote');
const coachMsg = $('coachMsg'), movesBody = $('movesBody'), movesBox = $('movesBox');
const evalFill = $('evalFill'), evalTxt = $('evalTxt');
const topClockEl = $('topClock'), bottomClockEl = $('bottomClock');

/* ============================== state ============================== */
const engine = new Engine('chess-assets/stockfish-18-lite-single.js');
let game = new Chess();
let bot = BOTS.find(b => b.id === 'henry');
let playerColor = 'w';
let baseMs = 15*60000, incMs = 10000;
let clocks = { w:0, b:0 };
let clockTimer = null, lastTick = 0, activeClock = null;
let phase = 'setup';            // setup | player | grading | confirm | bot | over
let coachOn = true;
let selected = null;            // selected square
let lastMove = null;            // {from,to}
let ghost = null;               // pending unconfirmed move (verbose chess.js move object)
let pendingClass = null;        // classification awaiting confirm
let analysis = null;            // { fen, best (info), bestUci }
let hintLevel = 0, hintTimer = null, turnStartedAt = 0;
let moveLog = [];               // entries: { num, side, san, info, cell }
let gameSeq = 0;                // guards stale async callbacks across games
let lastCaptureSquare = null;   // square of the player's latest capture (for instant recaptures)
let botBaseline = null;         // eval (bot's perspective) of the position the bot faces
let pendingBotGrade = null;     // bot move awaiting an "after" eval from the next analysis
/* telemetry for the grandmaster review */
let turnElapsedBase = 0;        // think time carried across take-backs within one turn
let hintsShown = 0, hintFull = 0, warnPlayed = 0, warnBack = 0;
let minClockMs = Infinity;      // lowest the player's clock got
let punishOps = [], punishPending = null;   // bot gifts and whether they were cashed
let drawOffers = 0, lastDrawOfferPly = -99, drawDeclined = 0;   // quirk: draw offers

/* ============================== setup screen ============================== */
const lsGet = k => { try { return localStorage.getItem(k); } catch (e) { return null; } };
const lsSet = (k, v) => { try { localStorage.setItem(k, v); } catch (e) {} };
let chosen = { color:'w', tc:'15+10', coach:'on', pace:'real',
               theme: lsGet('chess-trainer-theme') || 'classic' };
if (!THEMES[chosen.theme]) chosen.theme = 'classic';

const themeSel = $('themeSel');
for (const [key, t] of Object.entries(THEMES)) {
  const o = document.createElement('option');
  o.value = key; o.textContent = t.label;
  themeSel.appendChild(o);
}
themeSel.value = chosen.theme;
themeSel.onchange = () => { chosen.theme = themeSel.value; applyBoardLook(); };
function applyBoardLook() {
  const t = THEMES[chosen.theme];
  const wrap = document.querySelector('.chess-wrap');
  wrap.style.setProperty('--sq-light', t.light);
  wrap.style.setProperty('--sq-dark', t.dark);
  lsSet('chess-trainer-theme', chosen.theme);
}
const botGrid = $('botGrid');
BOTS.forEach(b => {
  const t = document.createElement('button');
  t.className = 'bot-tile';
  t.dataset.bot = b.id;
  t.innerHTML = `<span class="bot-ava" style="background:${b.color}">${avatarSVG(b)}</span>
                 <span><span class="bt-name">${bName(b)}</span><br><span class="bt-elo">${b.eloLabel || b.elo} Elo</span></span>`;
  t.onclick = () => selectBot(b);
  botGrid.appendChild(t);
});
function selectBot(b) {
  bot = b;
  botGrid.querySelectorAll('.bot-tile').forEach(x => x.classList.toggle('sel', x.dataset.bot === b.id));
  const p = b.profile;
  $('botProfile').innerHTML = `
    <div class="bp-head">
      <span class="bot-ava" style="background:${b.color}">${avatarSVG(b)}</span>
      <div>
        <div class="bp-name">${bName(b)} <span class="bp-elo">· ${b.eloLabel || b.elo} Elo</span></div>
        <div class="bp-blurb">${b.blurb}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bp-grid">
      <div><b>💪 Strengths:</b> ${p.strengths}</div>
      <div><b>⚠️ Weaknesses:</b> ${p.weaknesses}</div>
      <div><b>♟️ Playing since:</b> ${p.years}</div>
      <div><b>🎲 Fun fact:</b> ${p.fun}</div>
    </div>`;
}
selectBot(BOTS.find(b => b.id === 'henry'));

for (const segId of ['colorSeg','tcSeg','coachSeg','paceSeg']) {
  $(segId).querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => {
    btn.onclick = () => {
      $(segId).querySelectorAll('button').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('sel'));
      btn.classList.add('sel');
      if (segId === 'colorSeg') chosen.color = btn.dataset.v;
      if (segId === 'tcSeg')    chosen.tc = btn.dataset.v;
      if (segId === 'coachSeg') chosen.coach = btn.dataset.v;
      if (segId === 'paceSeg')  chosen.pace = btn.dataset.v;
    };
  });
}
applyBoardLook();

engine.ready.then(() => {
  $('startBtn').disabled = false;
  $('startBtn').textContent = 'Start game';
  $('engineNote').textContent = 'Engine ready. Everything runs locally in your browser.';
});
$('startBtn').onclick = startGame;
$('newBtn').onclick = () => { endToSetup(); };
let lateHints = lsGet('chess-trainer-latehint') === '1';
$('lateHint').checked = lateHints;
$('lateHint').onchange = e => { lateHints = e.target.checked; lsSet('chess-trainer-latehint', lateHints ? '1' : '0'); };
$('coachToggle').onchange = e => {
  coachOn = e.target.checked;
  if (!coachOn) { clearHints(); }
  $('hintBtn').disabled = !coachOn;
  $('lateHint').disabled = !coachOn;
};
$('hintBtn').onclick = () => { if (coachOn && phase === 'player') setHintLevel(Math.min(2, hintLevel + 1)); };

let resignArmed = false;
$('resignBtn').onclick = () => {
  if (phase === 'over' || phase === 'setup') return;
  if (!resignArmed) { resignArmed = true; $('resignBtn').textContent = 'Sure?'; setTimeout(() => { resignArmed = false; $('resignBtn').textContent = 'Resign'; }, 2500); return; }
  resignArmed = false; $('resignBtn').textContent = 'Resign';
  gameOver(playerColor === 'w' ? '0-1' : '1-0', 'You resigned.');
};
$('pgnBtn').onclick = () => {
  try {
    game.header('Event', `Training game vs ${bName(bot)}`, 'Site', 'h.oliabak.com',
                'Date', new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'.'),
                'White', playerColor === 'w' ? 'You' : `${bName(bot)} (bot)`,
                'Black', playerColor === 'b' ? 'You' : `${bName(bot)} (bot)`);
  } catch (e) {}
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(game.pgn()).then(() => {
    $('pgnBtn').textContent = 'Copied!';
    setTimeout(() => { $('pgnBtn').textContent = 'Copy PGN'; }, 1500);
  });
};
$('cbBack').onclick = () => resolveConfirm(false);
$('cbPlay').onclick = () => resolveConfirm(true);

/* ============================== game flow ============================== */
function startGame() {
  gameSeq++;
  game = new Chess();
  playerColor = chosen.color === 'random' ? (Math.random() < .5 ? 'w' : 'b') : chosen.color;
  const [mins, inc] = chosen.tc.split('+').map(Number);
  baseMs = mins*60000; incMs = inc*1000;
  clocks = { w: baseMs, b: baseMs };
  coachOn = chosen.coach === 'on';
  $('coachToggle').checked = coachOn;
  $('hintBtn').disabled = !coachOn;
  $('lateHint').disabled = !coachOn;
  moveLog = []; movesBody.innerHTML = '';
  lastMove = null; ghost = null; selected = null; analysis = null; lastCaptureSquare = null;
  botBaseline = null; pendingBotGrade = null;
  turnElapsedBase = 0; hintsShown = 0; hintFull = 0; warnPlayed = 0; warnBack = 0;
  minClockMs = Infinity; punishOps = []; punishPending = null;
  drawOffers = 0; lastDrawOfferPly = -99; drawDeclined = 0; hideDrawOffer();
  $('perfLine').style.display = 'none';
  setEvalDisplay(0, null);
  coachMsg.textContent = coachOn
    ? 'Make your move. If you think for a while, I’ll point you in the right direction.'
    : 'Coach is off. Plain game.';
  $('gAva').style.background = bot.color; $('gAva').innerHTML = avatarSVG(bot);
  $('gBotName').textContent = bot.name; $('gBotElo').textContent = `${bot.eloLabel || bot.elo} Elo · ${chosen.tc}`;
  $('topWho').textContent = bot.name; $('botWho').textContent = 'You';
  $('endOverlay').classList.remove('show');
  setupCard.style.display = 'none'; gameArea.style.display = 'block';
  renderBoard(); renderClocks();
  engine.newGame().then(() => {
    startClock();
    if (playerColor === 'w') enterPlayerTurn(); else enterBotTurn();
  });
}

function endToSetup() {
  gameSeq++;
  stopClock(); clearHints(); hideConfirm(); hideDrawOffer(false);
  $('thinkDots').classList.remove('on');
  phase = 'setup';
  engine.stopIf('analysis');
  $('endOverlay').classList.remove('show');
  gameArea.style.display = 'none'; setupCard.style.display = 'block';
}

function enterPlayerTurn(retry) {
  const seq = gameSeq;
  phase = 'player';
  selected = null; ghost = null;
  renderBoard();
  activeClock = playerColor;
  if (!retry) turnElapsedBase = 0;
  turnStartedAt = performance.now();
  hintLevel = 0;
  clearHints();
  scheduleHints();
  const fen = game.fen();
  analysis = { fen, best: null, bestUci: null };
  engine.analyse(fen, info => {
    if (seq !== gameSeq || !analysis || analysis.fen !== fen) return;
    analysis.best = info;
    analysis.bestUci = info.pv[0];
    if (pendingBotGrade && pendingBotGrade.fen === fen && info.depth >= 11) finalizeBotGrade(info.score);
    if ((phase === 'player' || phase === 'grading') && game.turn() === playerColor) {
      setEvalDisplay(scoreToWhite(info.score, playerColor), info.mate);
      if (hintLevel > 0) renderHints();
    }
  });
}

/* Human-like thinking time for the bot's chosen move (in ms).
   Quick on openings, recaptures and forced moves; rating-scaled thinks with
   occasional long tanks otherwise; hurries when its own clock runs low. */
function botThinkMs(uci) {
  if (chosen.pace === 'quick') return 500 + Math.random() * 700;
  const p = bot.think;
  const remaining = clocks[other(playerColor)];
  const legalCount = game.moves().length;
  const moveNo = Math.ceil((game.history().length + 1) / 2);
  let t;
  if (legalCount <= 2) t = 0.6 + Math.random() * 1.4;                                   // forced / near-forced
  else if (lastCaptureSquare && uci.slice(2, 4) === lastCaptureSquare) t = 0.8 + Math.random() * 1.7;  // recapture
  else {
    const r = Math.pow(Math.random(), 1.7);                                             // skew toward quick moves
    t = p.min + (p.max - p.min) * r;
    if (Math.random() < p.pLong) t = Math.min(p.longMax, t * (2.5 + Math.random() * 1.5));  // the long tank
    if (moveNo <= 5) t *= 0.35;                                                         // opening theory
  }
  t *= 0.85 + Math.random() * 0.3;
  let ms = t * 1000;
  ms = Math.min(ms, remaining * 0.12);          // never budget more than 12% of the clock
  if (remaining < 45000) ms = Math.min(ms, 1500);
  if (remaining < 15000) ms = Math.min(ms, 600);
  return Math.max(250, ms);
}

function enterBotTurn() {
  const seq = gameSeq;
  phase = 'bot';
  punishPending = null;           // unconsumed gift (coach-off or ungraded move) — drop it
  activeClock = other(playerColor);
  renderBoard();
  $('thinkDots').classList.add('on');
  const started = performance.now();
  /* make sure we know how good the bot's position is before it moves (for grading it) */
  if (botBaseline === null) {
    engine.evalPosition(game.fen(), null, 500)
      .then(r => { if (seq === gameSeq && phase === 'bot') botBaseline = r.score; })
      .catch(() => {});
  }
  engine.botMove(bot, game.fen()).then(uci => {
    if (seq !== gameSeq) return;
    /* absolute beginners: sometimes ignore the engine and play a random legal move */
    if (uci && uci !== '(none)' && bot.randomP && Math.random() < bot.randomP) {
      const legal = game.moves({ verbose: true });
      if (legal.length) {
        const rm = legal[Math.floor(Math.random() * legal.length)];
        uci = rm.from + rm.to + (rm.promotion || '');
      }
    }
    const think = (!uci || uci === '(none)') ? 0 : botThinkMs(uci);
    const wait = Math.max(0, think - (performance.now() - started));
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (seq !== gameSeq) return;
      $('thinkDots').classList.remove('on');
      if (!uci || uci === '(none)') { checkGameEnd(); return; }
      const mv = applyUci(uci);
      if (!mv) { checkGameEnd(); return; }
      clocks[other(playerColor)] += incMs;
      lastMove = { from: mv.from, to: mv.to };
      const entry = pushLog(mv, other(playerColor), null);
      pendingBotGrade = { fen: game.fen(), entry, san: mv.san };
      renderBoard(); renderClocks();
      if (!checkGameEnd()) enterPlayerTurn();
    }, wait);
  });
}

/* Grade the bot's last move once we have an eval of the resulting position
   (playerPerspScore comes from the player's analysis / grading of that position). */
function finalizeBotGrade(playerPerspScore) {
  const pg = pendingBotGrade;
  pendingBotGrade = null;
  if (!pg || botBaseline === null) { botBaseline = null; return; }
  const graded = classifyLoss(botBaseline, -playerPerspScore, false);
  botBaseline = null;
  pg.entry.info = graded;
  if (['mistake', 'blunder'].includes(graded.cls)) punishPending = { num: pg.entry.num };
  maybeOfferDraw(-playerPerspScore);
  renderBadge(pg.entry, coachOn);
  if (coachOn && (graded.cls === 'mistake' || graded.cls === 'blunder') && phase === 'player') {
    coachMsg.innerHTML = `${bName(bot)} played <b class="mv">${pg.san}</b>. ` +
      (graded.cls === 'blunder' ? 'That is a blunder <b>(??)</b>.' : 'That is a mistake <b>(?)</b>.') + ` Find the punishment!`;
  }
}

function applyUci(uci) {
  try {
    return game.move({ from: uci.slice(0,2), to: uci.slice(2,4), promotion: uci[4] || undefined });
  } catch (e) { return null; }
}

function commitPlayerMove(moveObj, cls) {
  const fenBefore = game.fen();
  const uci = moveObj.from + moveObj.to + (moveObj.promotion || '');
  const quietSnap = (!coachOn && analysis && analysis.fen === fenBefore && analysis.best && analysis.best.depth >= 8)
    ? { best: analysis.best, bestUci: analysis.bestUci } : null;
  const mv = game.move({ from: moveObj.from, to: moveObj.to, promotion: moveObj.promotion });
  clocks[playerColor] += incMs;
  lastMove = { from: mv.from, to: mv.to };
  lastCaptureSquare = mv.captured ? mv.to : null;
  ghost = null; pendingClass = null;
  hideConfirm(); clearHints();
  botBaseline = (cls && typeof cls.evalAfter === 'number') ? -cls.evalAfter : null;
  const entry = pushLog(mv, playerColor, cls);
  entry.thinkMs = turnElapsedBase + (performance.now() - turnStartedAt);
  if (punishPending) {
    punishOps.push({ cashed: !!(cls && ['best', 'excellent'].includes(cls.cls)) });
    punishPending = null;
  }
  showCoachNote(cls, mv);
  updatePerf();
  if (!coachOn && !game.isGameOver()) {
    engine.stopIf('analysis');
    gradeQuietly(fenBefore, uci, entry, quietSnap);
  }
  renderBoard(); renderClocks();
  if (!checkGameEnd()) enterBotTurn();
}

/* Coach off: grade in the background — nothing shown until the final report. */
function gradeQuietly(fenBefore, uci, entry, snap) {
  const seq = gameSeq;
  if (pendingBotGrade) pendingBotGrade = null;   // too late to settle the bot's previous move cleanly
  const afterP = engine.evalPosition(fenBefore, uci, 700);
  const baseP = snap ? Promise.resolve(snap.best) : engine.evalPosition(fenBefore, null, 500);
  Promise.all([baseP, afterP]).then(([base, after]) => {
    if (seq !== gameSeq) return;
    entry.info = classifyLoss(base.score, -after.score, snap && snap.bestUci === uci);
  }).catch(() => {});
}

function checkGameEnd() {
  if (game.isCheckmate()) {
    const winnerIsPlayer = game.turn() !== playerColor;
    gameOver(game.turn() === 'w' ? '0-1' : '1-0',
             winnerIsPlayer ? `Checkmate! You beat ${bName(bot)}!` : `Checkmate. ${bName(bot)} wins.`);
    return true;
  }
  if (game.isStalemate())            { gameOver('1/2-1/2', 'Draw by stalemate.'); return true; }
  if (game.isThreefoldRepetition())  { gameOver('1/2-1/2', 'Draw by threefold repetition.'); return true; }
  if (game.isDraw())                 { gameOver('1/2-1/2', 'Draw.'); return true; }
  return false;
}

/* ============================== clocks ============================== */
function startClock() {
  stopClock();
  lastTick = performance.now();
  clockTimer = setInterval(() => {
    const now = performance.now();
    const dt = now - lastTick; lastTick = now;
    if (phase === 'over' || phase === 'setup' || !activeClock) return;
    clocks[activeClock] -= dt;
    if (activeClock === playerColor) minClockMs = Math.min(minClockMs, clocks[playerColor]);
    if (clocks[activeClock] <= 0) {
      clocks[activeClock] = 0; renderClocks();
      const loserIsPlayer = activeClock === playerColor;
      gameOver(activeClock === 'w' ? '0-1' : '1-0',
               loserIsPlayer ? 'You ran out of time.' : `${bName(bot)} ran out of time. You win!`);
      return;
    }
    renderClocks();
  }, 200);
}
function stopClock() { if (clockTimer) { clearInterval(clockTimer); clockTimer = null; } }
function fmtClock(ms) {
  ms = Math.max(0, ms);
  const t = Math.ceil(ms / 1000), m = Math.floor(t / 60), s = t % 60;
  if (ms < 20000) return `${m}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')}.${Math.floor((ms % 1000) / 100)}`;
  return `${m}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')}`;
}
function renderClocks() {
  const botC = clocks[other(playerColor)], meC = clocks[playerColor];
  topClockEl.textContent = fmtClock(botC);
  bottomClockEl.textContent = fmtClock(meC);
  topClockEl.className    = 'clock' + (activeClock === other(playerColor) && phase !== 'over' ? (botC < 60000 ? ' low' : ' active') : '');
  bottomClockEl.className = 'clock' + (activeClock === playerColor && phase !== 'over' ? (meC < 60000 ? ' low' : ' active') : '');
}

/* ============================== board render ============================== */
function other(c) { return c === 'w' ? 'b' : 'w'; }
function sqColor(f, r) { return (f + r) % 2 === 0 ? 'dark' : 'light'; }  // f,r 0-indexed from a1
function orient(sq) {
  const f = FILES.indexOf(sq[0]), r = +sq[1] - 1;
  return playerColor === 'w' ? { x: f, y: 7 - r } : { x: 7 - f, y: r };
}
function squareAt(x, y) {  // grid coords → square name
  const f = playerColor === 'w' ? x : 7 - x;
  const r = playerColor === 'w' ? 7 - y : y;
  return FILES[f] + (r + 1);
}

function renderBoard() {
  const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();
  const inCheck = game.inCheck() ? findKing(game.turn()) : null;
  for (let y = 0; y < 8; y++) for (let x = 0; x < 8; x++) {
    const sq = squareAt(x, y);
    const f = FILES.indexOf(sq[0]), r = +sq[1] - 1;
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = `sq ${sqColor(f, r)}`;
    d.dataset.sq = sq;
    let piece = game.get(sq) || null;
    /* ghost rendering: show the tentative move before it is committed */
    if (ghost) {
      if (sq === ghost.from) piece = null;
      if (sq === ghost.to) piece = { color: playerColor, type: ghost.promotion || ghost.piece };
      if (ghost.flags && ghost.flags.includes('e') && sq === ghost.to[0] + ghost.from[1]) piece = null;   // en-passant victim
      if (ghost.flags && ghost.flags.includes('k')) {  // O-O rook
        const rk = ghost.from[1];
        if (sq === 'h' + rk) piece = null;
        if (sq === 'f' + rk) piece = { color: playerColor, type: 'r' };
      }
      if (ghost.flags && ghost.flags.includes('q')) {  // O-O-O rook
        const rk = ghost.from[1];
        if (sq === 'a' + rk) piece = null;
        if (sq === 'd' + rk) piece = { color: playerColor, type: 'r' };
      }
    }
    if (piece) {
      const img = document.createElement('img');
      img.className = 'pc'; img.src = PIECE_SRC(piece); img.draggable = false;
      img.alt = (piece.color === 'w' ? 'white ' : 'black ') + piece.type;
      d.appendChild(img);
    }
    if (lastMove && !ghost && (sq === lastMove.from || sq === lastMove.to)) d.classList.add('lastmove');
    if (selected === sq) d.classList.add('selsq');
    if (inCheck === sq && !ghost) d.classList.add('checksq');
    if (ghost && (sq === ghost.from || sq === ghost.to) && pendingClass)
      d.classList.add(pendingClass.cls === 'blunder' ? 'tint-blun' : 'tint-mist');
    if (x === 0) { const c = document.createElement('span'); c.className = 'coord rank'; c.textContent = sq[1]; d.appendChild(c); }
    if (y === 7) { const c = document.createElement('span'); c.className = 'coord file'; c.textContent = sq[0]; d.appendChild(c); }
    frag.appendChild(d);
  }
  boardEl.innerHTML = '';
  boardEl.appendChild(frag);
  $('evalbar').style.height = boardEl.clientWidth + 'px';
  if (selected) {
    for (const m of game.moves({ square: selected, verbose: true })) {
      const cell = boardEl.querySelector(`[data-sq="${m.to}"]`);
      if (!cell) continue;
      const dot = document.createElement('div');
      dot.className = 'dot' + (game.get(m.to) ? ' cap' : '');
      cell.appendChild(dot);
    }
  }
  renderHints();
}
function findKing(color) {
  for (const f of FILES) for (let r = 1; r <= 8; r++) {
    const p = game.get(f + r);
    if (p && p.type === 'k' && p.color === color) return f + r;
  }
  return null;
}

/* ============================== interaction ============================== */
let dragState = null;
boardEl.addEventListener('pointerdown', e => {
  if (phase !== 'player') return;
  const cell = e.target.closest('.sq'); if (!cell) return;
  const sq = cell.dataset.sq;
  const piece = game.get(sq);
  e.preventDefault();
  if (piece && piece.color === playerColor) {
    selected = sq;
    renderBoard();
    const img = boardEl.querySelector(`[data-sq="${sq}"] img.pc`);
    dragState = { from: sq, startX: e.clientX, startY: e.clientY, moved: false, img, ghostImg: null };
    boardEl.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
  } else if (selected) {
    tryPropose(selected, sq);
  }
});
boardEl.addEventListener('pointermove', e => {
  if (!dragState) return;
  const dx = e.clientX - dragState.startX, dy = e.clientY - dragState.startY;
  if (!dragState.moved && Math.hypot(dx, dy) > 6) {
    dragState.moved = true;
    if (dragState.img) {
      const g = dragState.img.cloneNode();
      g.className = 'drag-ghost';
      const s = boardEl.getBoundingClientRect().width / 8;
      g.style.width = g.style.height = s + 'px';
      document.body.appendChild(g);
      dragState.ghostImg = g;
      dragState.img.style.opacity = '.35';
    }
  }
  if (dragState.moved && dragState.ghostImg) {
    const s = parseFloat(dragState.ghostImg.style.width);
    dragState.ghostImg.style.left = (e.clientX - s / 2) + 'px';
    dragState.ghostImg.style.top = (e.clientY - s / 2) + 'px';
  }
});
function endDrag() {
  if (dragState && dragState.ghostImg) dragState.ghostImg.remove();
  if (dragState && dragState.img) dragState.img.style.opacity = '';
  dragState = null;
}
boardEl.addEventListener('pointerup', e => {
  if (!dragState) return;
  const wasDrag = dragState.moved, from = dragState.from;
  endDrag();
  if (!wasDrag) return;   // plain click: keep selection, wait for destination click
  /* browser hit-testing (works in both 2D and tilted 3D view; drag ghost is pointer-events:none) */
  const el = document.elementFromPoint(e.clientX, e.clientY);
  const cell = el && el.closest ? el.closest('#board .sq') : null;
  if (!cell) { selected = null; renderBoard(); return; }
  const to = cell.dataset.sq;
  if (to !== from) tryPropose(from, to);
});
boardEl.addEventListener('pointercancel', endDrag);

function tryPropose(from, to) {
  const legal = game.moves({ square: from, verbose: true }).filter(m => m.to === to);
  if (!legal.length) {
    const p = game.get(to);
    selected = (p && p.color === playerColor) ? to : null;
    renderBoard();
    return;
  }
  if (legal[0].promotion || legal.some(m => m.promotion)) {
    openPromoPicker(ch => proposeMove({ ...legal.find(m => (m.promotion || 'q') === ch) || legal[0], promotion: ch }));
    return;
  }
  proposeMove(legal[0]);
}

function openPromoPicker(cb) {
  const box = $('promoBox'); box.innerHTML = '';
  for (const t of ['q','r','b','n']) {
    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = PIECE_SRC({ color: playerColor, type: t });
    img.onclick = () => { $('promoOverlay').classList.remove('show'); cb(t); };
    box.appendChild(img);
  }
  $('promoOverlay').classList.add('show');
}

/* ============================== grading ============================== */
/* meBefore/meAfter are evals from the mover's perspective (mate-mapped cp). */
function classifyLoss(meBefore, meAfter, isEngineBest) {
  const loss = Math.max(0, meBefore - meAfter);
  let cls;
  if (loss < 45) cls = isEngineBest ? 'best' : 'excellent';
  else if (loss < 100) cls = 'good';
  else if (loss < 200) cls = 'inaccuracy';
  else if (loss < 400) cls = 'mistake';
  else cls = 'blunder';
  /* still completely winning → don't cry wolf */
  if (meAfter >= 600 && (cls === 'mistake' || cls === 'blunder')) cls = 'inaccuracy';
  else if (meAfter >= 250 && cls === 'blunder') cls = 'mistake';
  /* threw away a forced mate but still winning → at least flag it */
  if (meBefore > MATE - 2000 && meAfter < MATE - 2000 && cls === 'inaccuracy') cls = 'mistake';
  return { cls, loss, evalBefore: meBefore, evalAfter: meAfter };
}

async function proposeMove(moveObj) {
  selected = null;
  clearHints();
  hideDrawOffer(true);   // moving declines any pending draw offer
  /* game-ending moves commit instantly */
  const probe = new Chess(game.fen());
  probe.move({ from: moveObj.from, to: moveObj.to, promotion: moveObj.promotion });
  if (!coachOn || probe.isGameOver()) {
    ghost = null;
    commitPlayerMove(moveObj, coachOn && probe.isCheckmate() ? { cls: 'best', loss: 0 } : null);
    return;
  }
  const seq = gameSeq;
  phase = 'grading';
  ghost = moveObj; pendingClass = null;
  renderBoard();
  gradingNote.style.display = 'block';
  const fenBefore = game.fen();
  const uci = moveObj.from + moveObj.to + (moveObj.promotion || '');
  const snap = (analysis && analysis.fen === fenBefore && analysis.best && analysis.best.depth >= 8) ? analysis : null;
  engine.stopIf('analysis');

  try {
    /* played the engine's own move → instant Best, no extra search */
    if (snap && snap.bestUci === uci) {
      gradingNote.style.display = 'none';
      if (seq !== gameSeq) return;
      const replySan = snap.best.pv && snap.best.pv.length > 1 ? uciToSan(probe.fen(), snap.best.pv[1]) : null;
      commitPlayerMove(moveObj, { cls: 'best', loss: 0, evalBefore: snap.best.score, evalAfter: snap.best.score, replySan });
      return;
    }
    const base = snap ? snap.best
      : await engine.evalPosition(fenBefore, null, 600);
    if (seq !== gameSeq || phase !== 'grading') { gradingNote.style.display = 'none'; return; }
    /* a pending bot-move grade can settle now: base is a fresh eval of the same position */
    if (pendingBotGrade && pendingBotGrade.fen === fenBefore) finalizeBotGrade(base.score);
    const after = await engine.evalPosition(fenBefore, uci, 900);
    gradingNote.style.display = 'none';
    if (seq !== gameSeq || phase !== 'grading') return;

    const betterSan = snap ? uciToSan(fenBefore, snap.bestUci) : uciToSan(fenBefore, base.bestUci);
    const replySan = after.pv && after.pv.length ? uciToSan(probe.fen(), after.pv[0]) : null;
    const info = { ...classifyLoss(base.score, -after.score, false), betterSan, replySan };
    const cls = info.cls;

    if (cls === 'mistake' || cls === 'blunder') {
      pendingClass = info;
      phase = 'confirm';
      renderBoard();
      showConfirm(info, moveObj);
    } else {
      commitPlayerMove(moveObj, info);
    }
  } catch (err) {
    gradingNote.style.display = 'none';
    if (seq === gameSeq && (phase === 'grading' || phase === 'confirm')) commitPlayerMove(moveObj, null);
  }
}

function showConfirm(info, moveObj) {
  confirmBar.className = 'confirm-bar ' + (info.cls === 'blunder' ? 'blun' : 'mist');
  const word = info.cls === 'blunder' ? 'Blunder' : 'Mistake';
  const mark = info.cls === 'blunder' ? '??' : '?';
  const threat = info.replySan ? ` <b>${info.replySan}</b> is the punishment.` : '';
  confirmText.innerHTML = `<b>${moveObj.san} ${mark} ${word}.</b> Eval ${fmtEval(info.evalBefore)} → ${fmtEval(info.evalAfter)}.${threat} Take a closer look.`;
}
function hideConfirm() { confirmBar.className = 'confirm-bar'; gradingNote.style.display = 'none'; }
function resolveConfirm(playIt) {
  if (phase !== 'confirm' || !ghost) return;
  const moveObj = ghost, info = pendingClass;
  if (playIt) {
    warnPlayed++;
    commitPlayerMove(moveObj, info);
  } else {
    warnBack++;
    turnElapsedBase += performance.now() - turnStartedAt;   // the think continues, keep counting
    ghost = null; pendingClass = null;
    hideConfirm();
    coachMsg.innerHTML = 'Good decision. Take your time and find something better.';
    enterPlayerTurn(true);  // restarts analysis of the same position; clock keeps running
  }
}

/* ============================== draw offers (bot quirk) ============================== */
/* Some characters offer draws in positions where they are winning. Offer arrives
   right after their move, chess-etiquette style; making a move declines it. */
function maybeOfferDraw(botAdvantage) {
  const q = bot.quirks && bot.quirks.drawOffer;
  if (!q || phase !== 'player') return;
  const ply = game.history().length;
  if (drawOffers >= q.max || ply - lastDrawOfferPly < q.gapPlies || ply < 10) return;
  if (botAdvantage < q.advantage || Math.random() >= q.p) return;
  drawOffers++; lastDrawOfferPly = ply;
  $('drawText').innerHTML = `🤝 <b>${bName(bot)} offers a draw.</b> She is clearly better and did it anyway. Free half point, or play on for the win she just declined?`;
  $('drawBar').classList.add('show');
}
function hideDrawOffer(declined) {
  const bar = $('drawBar');
  if (declined && bar.classList.contains('show')) drawDeclined++;
  bar.classList.remove('show');
}
$('dbAccept').onclick = () => {
  if (phase !== 'player' || !$('drawBar').classList.contains('show')) return;
  hideDrawOffer(false);
  gameOver('1/2-1/2', `Draw by agreement. ${bName(bot)} offered it while winning, true to form.`);
};
$('dbDecline').onclick = () => hideDrawOffer(true);

/* ============================== hints ============================== */
function scheduleHints() {
  if (hintTimer) clearInterval(hintTimer);
  hintTimer = setInterval(() => {
    if (phase !== 'player' || !coachOn) return;
    const mult = lateHints ? 2 : 1;    // late hints: 20 s / 40 s instead of 10 s / 20 s
    const elapsed = performance.now() - turnStartedAt;
    if (elapsed >= HINT2_MS * mult && hintLevel < 2) setHintLevel(2);
    else if (elapsed >= HINT1_MS * mult && hintLevel < 1) setHintLevel(1);
  }, 400);
}
function setHintLevel(lv) {
  if (lv >= 1 && hintLevel === 0) hintsShown++;
  if (lv === 2 && hintLevel < 2) hintFull++;
  hintLevel = lv;
  renderHints();
}
function renderHints() {
  boardEl.querySelectorAll('.hint-from,.hint-to').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('hint-from','hint-to'));
  arrowLayer.innerHTML = '';
  if (!coachOn || hintLevel === 0 || phase !== 'player' || !analysis || !analysis.bestUci) return;
  const from = analysis.bestUci.slice(0,2), to = analysis.bestUci.slice(2,4);
  const fc = boardEl.querySelector(`[data-sq="${from}"]`);
  if (fc) fc.classList.add('hint-from');
  if (hintLevel >= 2) {
    const tc = boardEl.querySelector(`[data-sq="${to}"]`);
    if (tc) tc.classList.add('hint-to');
    drawArrow(from, to);
    coachMsg.innerHTML = `Look at <b class="mv">${uciToSan(game.fen(), analysis.bestUci) || from + '–' + to}</b>.`;
  } else {
    coachMsg.innerHTML = `Your piece on <b class="mv">${from}</b> has something to say.`;
  }
}
function clearHints() {
  if (hintTimer) { clearInterval(hintTimer); hintTimer = null; }
  boardEl.querySelectorAll('.hint-from,.hint-to').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('hint-from','hint-to'));
  arrowLayer.innerHTML = '';
}
function drawArrow(from, to) {
  const a = orient(from), b = orient(to);
  const x1 = a.x + .5, y1 = a.y + .5, x2 = b.x + .5, y2 = b.y + .5;
  const dx = x2 - x1, dy = y2 - y1, len = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
  if (!len) return;
  const ux = dx / len, uy = dy / len;
  const sx = x1 + ux * .35, sy = y1 + uy * .35;
  const ex = x2 - ux * .32, ey = y2 - uy * .32;
  const hw = .17, hl = .3;
  const bx = ex - ux * hl, by = ey - uy * hl;
  const svg = `
    <line x1="${sx}" y1="${sy}" x2="${bx}" y2="${by}" stroke="rgba(44,123,229,.85)" stroke-width="0.16" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <polygon points="${ex},${ey} ${bx - uy * hw},${by + ux * hw} ${bx + uy * hw},${by - ux * hw}" fill="rgba(44,123,229,.85)"/>`;
  arrowLayer.innerHTML = svg;
}

/* ============================== eval display ============================== */
function scoreToWhite(score, sideToMove) { return sideToMove === 'w' ? score : -score; }
function fmtEval(cpFromPlayer) {
  if (cpFromPlayer > MATE - 2000) return `M${Math.max(1, MATE - cpFromPlayer)}`;
  if (cpFromPlayer < -MATE + 2000) return `−M${Math.max(1, MATE + cpFromPlayer)}`;
  const v = cpFromPlayer / 100;
  return (v > 0 ? '+' : '') + v.toFixed(1);
}
function setEvalDisplay(whiteCp, mate) {
  const capped = Math.max(-1200, Math.min(1200, whiteCp));
  let share = 1 / (1 + Math.exp(-capped / 320));
  if (whiteCp > MATE - 2000) share = 1;
  if (whiteCp < -MATE + 2000) share = 0;
  evalFill.style.height = (share * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
  const fromPlayer = playerColor === 'w' ? whiteCp : -whiteCp;
  evalTxt.textContent = fmtEval(fromPlayer);
  evalTxt.style.color = fromPlayer >= 0 ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c';
}

/* ============================== move log & coach notes ============================== */
const CLS_LABEL = { best:'Best', excellent:'Excellent', good:'Good', inaccuracy:'Inaccuracy', mistake:'Mistake', blunder:'Blunder' };
const CLS_MARK  = { best:'✓', excellent:'!', good:'', inaccuracy:'?!', mistake:'?', blunder:'??' };
function pushLog(mv, side, cls) {
  const num = Math.ceil(game.history().length / 2);
  const isWhiteMove = mv.color === 'w';
  let row = movesBody.lastElementChild;
  if (isWhiteMove || !row) {
    row = document.createElement('tr');
    row.innerHTML = `<td class="num">${num}.</td><td class="mv"></td><td class="mv"></td>`;
    movesBody.appendChild(row);
  }
  const cell = row.children[isWhiteMove ? 1 : 2];
  const entry = { num, side, san: mv.san, info: cls, cell };
  moveLog.push(entry);
  renderBadge(entry, coachOn);
  movesBox.scrollTop = movesBox.scrollHeight;
  return entry;
}
function renderBadge(entry, show) {
  if (!entry.cell) return;
  const i = entry.info;
  /* the player gets full feedback; the opponent is only called out for bad moves */
  const visible = i && i.cls && (entry.side === playerColor
    ? i.cls !== 'good'
    : ['inaccuracy','mistake','blunder'].includes(i.cls));
  entry.cell.innerHTML = entry.san + (show && visible
    ? ` <span class="badge-c ${i.cls}" title="${CLS_LABEL[i.cls]}">${CLS_MARK[i.cls] || CLS_LABEL[i.cls]}</span>` : '');
}
function showCoachNote(cls, mv) {
  if (!coachOn || !cls) return;
  const c = cls.cls;
  const reply = cls.replySan ? ` I expect <b class="mv">${cls.replySan}</b> in reply.` : '';
  const swing = (typeof cls.evalBefore === 'number' && typeof cls.evalAfter === 'number')
    ? ` (${fmtEval(cls.evalBefore)} → ${fmtEval(cls.evalAfter)})` : '';
  if (c === 'best')
    coachMsg.innerHTML = `<b class="mv">${mv.san}</b> ✓ Best move, exactly what I would play.${reply}`;
  else if (c === 'excellent')
    coachMsg.innerHTML = `<b class="mv">${mv.san}</b>: excellent, practically as strong as the best move.${reply}`;
  else if (c === 'good')
    coachMsg.innerHTML = `<b class="mv">${mv.san}</b>: solid move${swing}.${reply}`;
  else {
    const better = cls.betterSan ? ` <b class="mv">${cls.betterSan}</b> was stronger.` : '';
    const cost = cls.loss >= 100 && cls.loss < MATE / 2
      ? ` It gives up about ${(cls.loss / 100).toFixed(1)} pawns of advantage${swing}.` : `${swing}.`;
    coachMsg.innerHTML = `<b class="mv">${mv.san}</b>: ${CLS_LABEL[c].toLowerCase()}.${cost}${better}${reply}`;
  }
}
/* ============================== rating estimate ============================== */
/* rough avg-centipawn-loss → Elo mapping (piecewise linear, lichess-data flavored) */
const ACPL_ELO = [[8,2700],[15,2500],[25,2200],[35,2000],[50,1800],[70,1550],[90,1350],[120,1100],[160,850],[220,600],[300,350],[500,150]];
function estimateElo() {
  const losses = moveLog.filter(e => e.side === playerColor && e.info).map(e => Math.min(500, e.info.loss));
  if (losses.length < 3) return null;
  const acpl = losses.reduce((s, x) => s + x, 0) / losses.length;
  let elo = ACPL_ELO[ACPL_ELO.length - 1][1];
  for (let i = 0; i < ACPL_ELO.length; i++) {
    const [a, e] = ACPL_ELO[i];
    if (acpl <= a) {
      if (i === 0) { elo = e; break; }
      const [pa, pe] = ACPL_ELO[i - 1];
      elo = pe + (e - pe) * (acpl - pa) / (a - pa);
      break;
    }
  }
  return { elo: Math.round(elo / 50) * 50, acpl: Math.round(acpl), n: losses.length };
}
/* the bot whose rating is closest to the average of the player's estimated level
   and the current opponent — ties round up toward the bigger challenge */
function suggestBot(estElo) {
  const target = (estElo + bot.elo) / 2;
  let best = null;
  for (const b of BOTS) {
    if (!best) { best = b; continue; }
    const d = Math.abs(b.elo - target), bd = Math.abs(best.elo - target);
    if (d < bd || (d === bd && b.elo > best.elo)) best = b;
  }
  return best;
}
function updatePerf() {
  const est = estimateElo();
  const el = $('perfLine');
  if (!coachOn || !est || est.n < 6) { el.style.display = 'none'; return; }
  el.style.display = 'block';
  const sug = suggestBot(est.elo);
  const sugTxt = sug && sug.id !== bot.id ? ` Try a game with ${bName(sug)} (${sug.eloLabel || sug.elo}).` : '';
  el.textContent = `You're playing like ~${est.elo} so far (rough estimate, ${est.n} moves).${sugTxt}`;
}

function uciToSan(fen, uci) {
  if (!uci) return null;
  try {
    const c = new Chess(fen);
    const m = c.move({ from: uci.slice(0,2), to: uci.slice(2,4), promotion: uci[4] || undefined });
    return m.san;
  } catch (e) { return null; }
}

window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
  if (phase !== 'setup') $('evalbar').style.height = boardEl.clientWidth + 'px';
});

/* ============================== grandmaster review ============================== */
/* Ryan (2600+) reviews the player's game from collected telemetry:
   accuracy, phase quality, think times, clock handling, hints, warnings, punished gifts. */
function gmReviewHTML(playerWon, isDraw, est) {
  const g = moveLog.filter(m => m.side === playerColor && m.info);
  if (g.length < 3 || !est) return '';
  const S = [];   // sentences grouped later

  /* result + level */
  const diff = est.elo - bot.elo;
  let p1;
  if (bot.id === 'ryan') p1 = `You came straight for me. Bold.`;
  else if (isDraw) p1 = `A draw with ${bName(bot)}. Half points teach half lessons.`;
  else if (playerWon && diff >= 300) p1 = `You beat ${bName(bot)}, which is expected at your strength. The interesting part is how.`;
  else if (playerWon && diff <= -200) p1 = `You took down ${bName(bot)} playing above your level. I notice these things.`;
  else if (playerWon) p1 = `A fair fight against ${bName(bot)}, and you took it. Earned.`;
  else if (diff <= -300) p1 = `You lost to a stronger opponent. No shame in that, but no excuses either.`;
  else if (diff >= 300) p1 = `Losing to ${bName(bot)} while playing ${est.elo}-level moves? The scoresheet does not care how pretty your moves were.`;
  else p1 = `Losing to ${bName(bot)} at your level should sting a little. Good. Let it.`;
  S.push([p1 + ` Your moves averaged ${est.acpl} centipawns of loss. That is ~${est.elo} territory.`]);

  /* moves */
  const m2 = [];
  const open = g.filter(m => m.num <= 8);
  if (open.length >= 3) {
    const oa = Math.round(open.reduce((s, m) => s + Math.min(500, m.info.loss), 0) / open.length);
    m2.push(oa <= 35 ? `The opening was tidy (${oa} cp average loss).`
                     : `You were already bleeding in the opening (${oa} cp average). Opening study is free rating.`);
  }
  const errs = g.filter(m => ['mistake', 'blunder'].includes(m.info.cls));
  if (errs.length) {
    const worst = errs.slice().sort((a, b) => b.info.loss - a.info.loss)[0];
    m2.push(`Worst moment: move ${worst.num}, ${worst.san}.${worst.info.betterSan ? ` ${worst.info.betterSan} was right there.` : ''}`);
  } else {
    m2.push(`No mistakes, no blunders. I have very little to criticize, which is rare.`);
  }
```
