```{=html}
  if (punishOps.length) {
    const cashed = punishOps.filter(p => p.cashed).length;
    m2.push(cashed === punishOps.length
      ? `${bName(bot)} handed you ${punishOps.length} gift${punishOps.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} and you punished every one. Ruthless. Good.`
      : `I counted ${punishOps.length} gift${punishOps.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} from ${bName(bot)}; you converted ${cashed}. A gift declined is a gift returned.`);
  }
  S.push(m2);

  /* timing */
  const t3 = [];
  const thinks = g.map(m => m.thinkMs || 0);
  const avgT = thinks.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / thinks.length / 1000;
  t3.push(`You averaged ${avgT < 10 ? avgT.toFixed(1) : Math.round(avgT)} seconds a move.`);
  const rushed = errs.filter(m => (m.thinkMs || 0) < 5000).length;
  if (rushed) t3.push(`${rushed} of your ${errs.length} serious error${errs.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} came after less than five seconds of thought. Sit on your hands.`);
  const maxT = Math.max(...thinks);
  if (maxT >= 20000) {
    const long = g[thinks.indexOf(maxT)];
    t3.push(['best', 'excellent', 'good'].includes(long.info.cls)
      ? `The ${Math.round(maxT / 1000)}-second think on move ${long.num} paid off.`
      : `You spent ${Math.round(maxT / 1000)} seconds on move ${long.num} and still went wrong. Long thought needs direction, not just duration.`);
  }
  if (minClockMs < 60000) t3.push(`You dipped under a minute on the clock. That is where games go to die.`);
  else if (!playerWon && !isDraw && clocks[playerColor] > baseMs * 0.4)
    t3.push(`And you lost with ${Math.round(clocks[playerColor] / 60000)} minutes unspent. Time is material. Spend it.`);
  S.push(t3);

  /* behavior */
  const b4 = [];
  if (!coachOn) b4.push(`No hints, no warnings, no safety net. Proper tournament conditions. Respect.`);
  else {
    b4.push(hintsShown === 0 ? `You never needed a hint.`
      : `You leaned on ${hintsShown} hint${hintsShown === 1 ? '' : 's'}${hintFull ? ` (${hintFull} full reveal${hintFull === 1 ? '' : 's'})` : ''}. Fine for training, but at the board there are none.`);
    const warns = warnPlayed + warnBack;
    if (warns) {
      if (warnPlayed === 0) b4.push(`Warned ${warns} time${warns === 1 ? '' : 's'}, you stepped back each time. Discipline.`);
      else b4.push(`You pushed through ${warnPlayed} of ${warns} warning${warns === 1 ? '' : 's'}. Stubbornness is not a strategy.`);
    }
  }
  if (drawDeclined > 0) b4.push(`You declined a draw offer and played for more. I respect it.`);
  S.push(b4);

  const ryan = BOTS.find(b => b.id === 'ryan');
  return `<div class="gm-box">
    <div class="gm-head">
      <span class="bot-ava" style="background:${ryan.color};width:34px;height:34px;">${avatarSVG(ryan)}</span>
      <div><b>Grandmaster review</b><br><span class="gm-sub">GM Ryan · 2600+</span></div>
    </div>
    ${S.filter(x => x.length).map(x => `<p>${x.join(' ')}</p>`).join('')}
  </div>`;
}

/* ============================== game over & report ============================== */
function gameOver(result, reason) {
  if (phase === 'over') return;
  phase = 'over';
  gameSeq++;                     // cancel any in-flight bot think / analysis callbacks
  activeClock = null;
  stopClock(); clearHints(); hideConfirm(); hideDrawOffer(false);
  $('thinkDots').classList.remove('on');
  engine.stopIf('analysis');
  ghost = null; renderBoard(); renderClocks();
  for (const e of moveLog) renderBadge(e, true);   // reveal all badges (incl. coach-off games)
  const counts = { best:0, excellent:0, good:0, inaccuracy:0, mistake:0, blunder:0 };
  const graded = moveLog.filter(m => m.side === playerColor && m.info && m.info.cls);
  graded.forEach(m => counts[m.info.cls]++);
  const worst = graded.filter(m => ['mistake','blunder','inaccuracy'].includes(m.info.cls))
                      .sort((a, b) => (b.info.loss || 0) - (a.info.loss || 0)).slice(0, 3);
  const playerWon = (result === '1-0' && playerColor === 'w') || (result === '0-1' && playerColor === 'b');
  const title = result === '1/2-1/2' ? 'Draw' : playerWon ? 'You win! 🎉' : `${bName(bot)} wins`;
  let html = `<h3>${title}</h3><div class="sub">${reason} (${result})</div>`;
  if (graded.length) {
    html += `<div class="rep-counts">
      <span>✓ Best: ${counts.best}</span><span>! Excellent: ${counts.excellent}</span><span>Good: ${counts.good}</span>
      <span>?! Inaccuracies: ${counts.inaccuracy}</span><span>? Mistakes: ${counts.mistake}</span><span>?? Blunders: ${counts.blunder}</span>
    </div>`;
    if (worst.length) {
      html += `<div style="font-weight:700;font-size:13.5px;margin-bottom:2px;">Review these:</div>`;
      for (const m of worst)
        html += `<div class="rep-mist">${m.num}. ${m.san} ${CLS_MARK[m.info.cls]}, better was <b>${m.info.betterSan || '…'}</b> (${fmtEval(m.info.evalBefore)} → ${fmtEval(m.info.evalAfter)})</div>`;
    } else {
      html += `<div class="rep-mist">Clean game. Nothing to scold you for. 👏</div>`;
    }
    const est = estimateElo();
    var repSug = null;
    if (est) {
      html += `<div class="rep-mist" style="margin-top:8px;"><b>Estimated performance: ~${est.elo}</b> (avg loss ${est.acpl} cp over ${est.n} graded moves). One game is a very rough sample.</div>`;
      const sug = suggestBot(est.elo);
      if (sug && sug.id !== bot.id) repSug = sug;
      else html += `<div class="rep-mist">You and ${bName(bot)} look well matched. Run it back!</div>`;
    }
    const botGraded = moveLog.filter(m => m.side !== playerColor && m.info && m.info.cls);
    const bMist = botGraded.filter(m => m.info.cls === 'mistake').length;
    const bBlun = botGraded.filter(m => m.info.cls === 'blunder').length;
    if (bMist + bBlun > 0)
      html += `<div class="rep-mist">${bName(bot)} made ${bMist} mistake${bMist === 1 ? '' : 's'} and ${bBlun} blunder${bBlun === 1 ? '' : 's'}.</div>`;
    html += gmReviewHTML(playerWon, result === '1/2-1/2', est);
  }
  html += `<div class="act-row">`
        + (repSug ? `<button id="repSuggest" style="border-color:#2c7be5;color:#2c7be5;">Play ${bName(repSug)} (${repSug.eloLabel || repSug.elo}) next</button>` : '')
        + `<button id="repNew">New game</button><button id="repClose">View board</button></div>`;
  $('endBox').innerHTML = html;
  $('endOverlay').classList.add('show');
  if (repSug) $('repSuggest').onclick = () => { selectBot(repSug); endToSetup(); };
  $('repNew').onclick = () => endToSetup();
  $('repClose').onclick = () => $('endOverlay').classList.remove('show');
  coachMsg.textContent = reason + ' Start a new game whenever you’re ready.';
}
</script>
```
